title: Cozy At-Home Yoga and Meditation Corner with Cushions and Indoor Plants
description: A warm and inviting yoga and meditation corner at home featuring a blue meditation cushion set on a woven rug, surrounded by indoor potted plants. The space includes lit candles on a wooden tray, a water bottle, and an incense stick, all bathed in soft natural light from a large window. The setting evokes calmness and relaxation with natural textures and cozy elements.
